HGSS.514.0000:
At the Pokémon League, you’ll get
tested by the Elite Four.\r
You have to beat them all.\f
If you lose, you have to start
all over!
HGSS.514.0001:
Some Trainers suddenly feel
discouraged and leave.\f
My ABRA can take you home.
But...\f
Trainers just Fly home lately...
I feel left out.\r
I am sure my ABRA feels the same way.
HGSS.514.0003:
[0103,0000,0000]: Hold it.\f
You’re going to take the Pokémon
League challenge now?\f
You’ll have to give up on that.\f
My well-trained-beyond-recognition
Pokémon are going to pound you.\f
Right now, right here!
I challenge you!\f
HGSS.514.0004:
[0103,0000,0000]: ...Oh, no... I still can’t
win after all that training...\f
I...I have to believe more in my
Pokémon...\f
...No big deal.
Sorry to have got in the way.\f
Don’t forget to rest your Pokémon
before you challenge the Champion!\f
HGSS.514.0005:
Once you enter this door, you will be
facing one of the Elite Four.\f
They are really tough!
You cannot exit once you enter.\r
Are you ready?\r
Be courageous and go for it!\f
HGSS.514.0006:
Once you enter this door, you will be

They are really tough!
You cannot exit once you enter.\r
Are you ready?\r
